songs.title: Down
feed: “Down” by blink-182 returns to #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for a 4th nonconsecutive week at the top.
“Down” by blink-182 is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 69 sales units.
“Down” by blink-182 is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 115 streams units.
“Down” by blink-182 is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 304,045 total units.
